mapper.sql: order_id, order_no, product_id, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, order_status, order_amount, trade_location, seller_confirm_time, buyer_complete_time, close_time, close_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info ( order_no, product_id, buyer_user_id, seller_user_id, order_status, order_amount, trade_location, seller_confirm_time, buyer_complete_time, close_time, close_reason, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{buyerUserId}, #{sellerUserId}, #{orderStatus}, #{orderAmount}, #{tradeLocation}, #{sellerConfirmTime}, #{buyerCompleteTime}, #{closeTime}, #{closeReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_no = #{orderNo}, product_id = #{productId}, buyer_user_id = #{buyerUserId}, seller_user_id = #{sellerUserId}, order_status = #{orderStatus}, order_amount = #{orderAmount}, trade_location = #{tradeLocation}, seller_confirm_time = #{sellerConfirmTime}, buyer_complete_time = #{buyerCompleteTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, close_reason = #{closeReason}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM order_info WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0
AND (buyer_user_id = #{currentUserId} OR seller_user_id = #{currentUserId})
AND order_status IN
#{status}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND order_status = #{orderStatus}
AND (buyer_user_id = #{currentUserId} OR seller_user_id = #{currentUserId})
